---
title: "What's new & updated"
pagetitle: "News | Jeff Baldock"
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <meta name="description" content="Recent updates regarding new publications and preprints, conference presentations and upcoming talks, field season updates and milestones, funding announcements and new collaborations, students and lab members" />
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
